creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
How about https://reviews.freebsd.org/D9541 ?

I am not clear why you redefine ARCH.  What's wrong with the default value, 'uname -p'?

I feel the ONLY_FOR_ARCHS definition is unnecessary.  You are accounting for most supported architectures except for uncommon ones like sparc64.  Also, I tested the build on armv6 and it passed.
